| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | And Elihu made answer and said, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Does it seem to you to be right, and righteousness before God, to say, | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | What profit is it to me, and how am I better off than if I had done wrong? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | I will make answer to you and to your friends: | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Let your eyes be turned to the heavens, and lifted up to see the skies; they are higher than you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | If you have done wrong, is he any the worse for it? and if your sins are great in number, what is it to him? | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | If you are upright, what do you give to him? or what does he take from your hand? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Your evil-doing may have an effect on a man like yourself, or your righteousness on a son of man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Because the hand of the cruel is hard on them, men are making sounds of grief; they are crying out for help because of the arm of the strong. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | But no one has said, Where is God my Maker, who gives songs in the night; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Who gives us more knowledge than the beasts of the earth, and makes us wiser than the birds of the heaven? | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | There they are crying out because of the pride of the evil-doers, but he gives them no answer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | But God will not give ear to what is false, or the Ruler of all take note of it; | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | How much less when you say that you do not see him; that the cause is before him, and you are waiting for him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | And now ... ; | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | And Job's mouth is open wide to give out what is of no profit, increasing words without knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
